channel.title: Security Awareness on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Security Awareness on simeononsecurity

item.title: ESP32 WiFi Canary: Passive 2.4 GHz Threat Detection with RGB LED Alerts
item.category: "Network Security" , "WiFi Security" , "IoT Security" , "Security Research" , "Embedded Systems" , "Privacy Tools" , "ESP32 Projects" , "Hardware Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Open Source Security"
item.description: A detailed breakdown into the ESP32 WiFi Canary project - a compact, passive 2.4 GHz awareness sensor for the M5Stack Atom Lite that silently watches for evil-twin APs, deauthentication attacks, security downgrades, and beacon floods using a confidence-scored threat model and a single RGB LED.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Program Management and Oversight
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Audits" , "Security Awareness" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Third-Party Risk" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security program management and oversight for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn governance, risk management, third-party risk, compliance, audits, and security awareness.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security and Risk Management
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Management" , "Risk Management" , "Security Governance" , "Compliance" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Security Policy" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security and Risk Management for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn professional ethics, security concepts, governance, compliance, risk management, supply chain risk, and awareness.

item.title: Shield Your Company: Insider Threat Protection Strategies Unveiled
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Corporate Security" , "Insider Threats" , "Data Protection" , "Employee Training" , "Security Measures" , "Incident Response" , "Behavior Analytics" , "User Activity Monitoring" , "Security Culture"
item.description: Discover powerful strategies to guard your company against insider threats, implementing access controls, monitoring user activities, and building a culture of security. Safeguard your assets today!

item.title: Mastering Cybersecurity: A Proactive Guide to Effective Incident Response Planning
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Incident Response" , "Business Security" , "Cyber Threats" , "Risk Management" , "Security Planning" , "Data Protection" , "IT Security" , "Digital Resilience" , "Crisis Management"
item.description: Explore the essential steps for businesses to master incident response planning, ensuring a swift and resilient defense against cyber threats - discover key strategies and help your team to safeguard against evolving security challenges.

item.title: help Your Workforce: Building a Resilient Human Firewall Against Cyber Threats
item.category: "Cybersecurity Training" , "Employee Empowerment" , "Human Firewall Strategies" , "Security Awareness" , "Digital Defense Techniques" , "Threat Mitigation" , "Simulated Cyber Attacks" , "Training Program Design" , "Measuring Training Impact" , "Continuous Improvement"
item.description: Enhance your organization's cybersecurity with expert strategies! Learn the art of creating a robust human firewall, fortifying defenses against cyber attacks. Uncover the latest threats and help your team to stand strong against evolving risks. Level up your security game now!

item.description: Discover the key to unshakable business security with 7 essential practices, from physical fortifications to cybersecurity resilience. Safeguard your success now!

item.description: Unleash the power of ChatGPT in cybersecurity! From threat intelligence to incident response, discover how AI fortifies defenses and elevates your security strategy.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Importance of Physical Security

item.title: 7 Essential Network Security Measures to Protect Your Business from Cyber Threats
item.category: "network security measures" , "business network security" , "cyber threats" , "network security policy" , "firewalls and intrusion prevention systems" , "wireless network security" , "software and hardware updates" , "multi-factor authentication" , "network activity monitoring" , "security breach response"
